summary: LeakageWorkflowPanel portal modal with six step renderers for all four leakage task types. Fixture-driven detail, evidence (PII guard), root cause, recommended action, mock execution stepper, and success screens. UI-only; no new routes or backend calls.

interfaceChanges.description: Portal modal workflow panel consuming useLeakageWorkflow with six step renderers.

mappings.criterion: LeakageWorkflowPanel mounts in a portal modal with step navigation controls
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_ui.test.tsx::mounts in a portal modal with step navigation controls

mappings.criterion: All six steps render with fixture-driven content for each of the four task types
Evidence step invokes assertEvidenceHasNoRawPii on render
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_ui.test.tsx::renders masked buyer IDs on evidence step

mappings.criterion: Mock execution stepper shows sub-steps from fixture execution_plan with deterministic progress
Success step displays headline and metrics from fixture success payload
Integration test: panel renders detail step for return_spike fixture
Integration test: evidence step renders masked buyer IDs for at least one task type
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_ui.test.tsx::renders masked buyer IDs on evidence step
web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_ui.test.tsx::mounts in a portal modal with step navigation controls
